landing.subtitle: The express freight quoting engine built for forwarding partners. Calculate Door-to-Door costs with real-time exchange rates and FSC — instantly.
landing.featuresTitle: Smart Quoting Built for Network Partners
landing.instantQuotes.desc: Calculate Door-to-Door and Door-to-Airport costs with live exchange rates and fuel surcharges. Compare carriers side by side to find the best rate.
landing.accurateBreakdown.desc: Itemized breakdown of international freight, FSC, packing, and add-on services — fully transparent pricing for accurate quotes. (Customs duties quoted separately)
landing.verifiedCarriers.desc: Accurate pricing based on actual carrier rate structures. All-in-one quotes including packing, add-on services, and Door-to-Door costs.
landing.footer: © 2026 BridgeLogis. Bridging Your Cargo to the World. All rights reserved.
auth.name: Name
auth.emailExists: Email already exists or data is invalid.
auth.networksHint: Select the global freight networks you belong to (optional)
auth.networkDesc.WCA: World Cargo Alliance — 195 countries, 12,500+ offices, largest forwarder network
auth.networkDesc.MPL: MarcoPoloLine Group — 96 countries, 458 offices, elite premium network
auth.networkDesc.EAN: Exclusive Air Network — Air cargo specialist, 1 member per country
auth.networkDesc.JCtrans: JCtrans — China's largest logistics B2B platform (jctrans.com)
auth.magicLink.title: Sign in with magic link
auth.magicLink.description: We'll email you a secure sign-in link.
auth.magicLink.sentBody: If that email exists in our system, we've sent a sign-in link. The link expires in 15 minutes.
auth.magicLink.expired: This link has expired or has already been used.
auth.magicLink.requestFailed: Failed to send sign-in link. Please try again.
calc.shipmentConfigDesc: Enter cargo details to generate an integrated international quote.
calc.costBasis.title: Calculation Basis
calc.costBasis.material: Material: Cargo surface area (m²) x KRW 15,000
calc.costBasis.labor: Labor: KRW 50,000 per box (1.5x for vacuum packing)
calc.costBasis.disclaimer: Prices include all estimated surcharges. Final invoice may vary based on actual measurements.
calc.financial.exchangeHint: Hana Bank Mon 9AM remittance rate · Updated weekly
calc.financial.fscHint: UPS: Updated weekly · DHL: Updated monthly · Click LIVE for latest
calc.service.pickup.label: Seoul Pickup Additional Cost (KRW)
calc.service.pickup.hint: Enter additional costs if cargo pickup is required within Seoul.
calc.service.pickup.guide.title: 📦 LCL Consolidation Cut-off
calc.service.pickup.guide.same: Pickup before 14:00 → Warehousing by 18:00 same day
calc.service.pickup.guide.next: Pickup after 14:00 → Warehousing by 10:00 next day
calc.service.pickup.same.label: Same-day Consolidation
calc.service.pickup.next.label: Next-day Consolidation
calc.service.surcharge.title: Surcharges
calc.service.surcharge.none: No active surcharges at this time.
calc.service.surcharge.manualHint: Enter any additional surcharges not covered by the system.
calc.service.surcharge.notice.title: Real-time Data Notice
calc.service.surcharge.notice.body: Surcharges are manually updated by admins based on official UPS/DHL announcements. They are not auto-synced in real time. Please verify the latest rates on the official carrier pages before finalizing your quote.
pdf.disclaimer.ko: 본 견적서는 유효기간 내 확인 기준이며, 할증료 변동 시 재산정될 수 있습니다.
pdf.disclaimer.en: This quotation is valid within the stated period. Surcharges are subject to change at time of booking.
